prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical 4:5 smartphone selfie portrait at blue hour on an outdoor balcony. A young East Asian woman with shoulder-length dark brown tousled hair with soft face-framing bangs is framed from the chest up with a wide-angle front-camera perspective, her right arm extended toward the camera so the sleeve is large in the foreground. She looks off to the viewer’s right with a calm, slightly wistful expression, glossy lips, natural makeup, visible skin texture, subtle cheek highlights, and realistic pores. She wears a cream ribbed off-shoulder long-sleeve knit top, a delicate thin necklace, and small dark green hoop earrings. Lighting: deep blue twilight sky and clouds behind her, dark silhouetted trees and balcony/building lights in the background, but her face and upper body are lit by close soft phone fill/HDR flash, preserving natural skin tone, gentle specular highlights on nose, lips, cheeks, and collarbones, and a clear separation between warm foreground skin and cool blue environment. Composition: subject centered slightly right, head near upper third, shoulders diagonal, balcony railing and dark rooftops receding behind, shallow depth of field with mild phone-camera distortion, high dynamic range, crisp realistic detail, no beauty-filter plastic skin. Add a minimalist editorial overlay at the bottom left: exactly 2 text lines reading “WILDCORE / VOL.01” and “TEST 02 / V01 / BLUE-HOUR FILL / NATURAL SKIN”; include exactly 2 graphic elements: one thin white horizontal rule stretching across the lower frame and one short orange dash at the left under the first line. Use clean small uppercase white sans-serif typography, cinematic lifestyle photography, natural color grading, no watermark, no extra text.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical 4:5 smartphone selfie portrait at blue hour on an outdoor balcony. A young East Asian woman with shoulder-length dark brown tousled hair with soft face-framing bangs is framed from the chest up with a wide-angle front-camera perspective, her right arm extended toward the camera so the sleeve is large in the foreground. She looks off to the viewer’s right with a calm, slightly wistful expression, glossy lips, natural makeup, visible skin texture, subtle cheek highlights, and realistic pores. She wears a cream ribbed off-shoulder long-sleeve knit top, a delicate thin necklace, and small dark green hoop earrings. Lighting: deep blue twilight sky and clouds behind her, dark silhouetted trees and balcony/building lights in the background, but her face and upper body are lit by close soft phone fill/HDR flash, preserving natural skin tone, gentle specular highlights on nose, lips, cheeks, and collarbones, and a clear separation between warm foreground skin and cool blue environment. Use clean small uppercase white sans-serif typography, cinematic lifestyle photography, natural color grading, no watermark, no extra text.
promptZh: 创作一张 4:5 比例的逼真竖构图智能手机自拍肖像，场景设定在户外阳台的蓝调时刻。一位年轻的东亚女性，留着 齐肩深棕色凌乱发型，配有柔和的修颜刘海，采用广角前置摄像头视角进行胸部以上取景，她的右臂向镜头伸展，使袖口在前景中显得较大。她看向观者的右侧，表情平静且略带忧郁，双唇有光泽，妆容自然，皮肤质感清晰可见，脸颊有细腻的高光，毛孔真实。她身穿 一件米色罗纹露肩长袖针织上衣，佩戴一条精致的细项链和一对深绿色小圆环耳环。光影：背景为深蓝色的暮色天空与云层，远处有深色的树木剪影和阳台/建筑灯光，但她的面部和上半身由近距离柔和的手机补光/HDR 闪光灯照亮，保留了自然的肤色，鼻尖、嘴唇、脸颊和锁骨处有柔和的镜面高光，温暖的前景皮肤与冷色调的蓝色环境形成清晰的对比。构图：主体略微偏右，头部位于上方三分之一处，肩膀呈对角线，阳台栏杆和深色屋顶向后延伸，浅景深，带有轻微的手机镜头畸变，高动态范围，细节清晰逼真，无美颜滤镜带来的塑料感。在左下角添加极简主义的编辑风格文字叠加：精确包含 2 行文字，内容为“WILDCORE / VOL.01”和“TEST 02 / V01 / BLUE-HOUR FILL / NATURAL SKIN”；包含 2 个图形元素：一条横跨下方的细白色水平线，以及第一行文字下方左侧的一个短橙色短横线。使用简洁的小写大号白色无衬线字体，电影级生活方式摄影，自然色彩分级，无水印，无额外文字。
